untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pair trading / correlation analysis between two correlated instruments (spread calculation, rolling median, standard deviation of spread, correlation coefficient calculation, and notional exposure matching). The allowed indicators are single-instrument technical indicators only. Required but unavailable: (1) spread between two instrument pairs, (2) rolling 252-day median of spread, (3) rolling standard deviation of spread, (4) rolling correlation coefficient between instruments, (5) notional exposure balancing logic. These require multi-instrument data structures and custom calculations not supported by the single-instrument indicator set.
translation_notes: MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_17 is a statistical arbitrage / pairs trading strategy requiring simultaneous analysis of two correlated instruments and their relative pricing divergence. This cannot be expressed using only single-instrument price and technical indicators. Implementation would require: custom spread indicator, rolling correlation matrix, z-score normalization of spreads, and dual-leg position management logic.
